description.p: AbraFlexi WebHook Acceptor receives and stores webhook notifications from the AbraFlexi accounting system. Incoming change events are persisted to a configured database backend.

ul.li: Api — proxy to an external API endpoint (experimental)

description.p: The acceptor runs as a PHP web service under Apache and is discoverable on the local network via Avahi/mDNS. After installation, point your AbraFlexi server at the URL exposed by the service to start receiving change notifications.
